body_preview: - Phase A1 self-test (Day 110, 2026-06-18 19:14): `deepseek cache-report` returned "no state log found at .yoyo/state/events.jsonl" while `state failures --recent` and `state evals` showed data from the SQLite projection. - `handle_cache_report` (src/commands_deepseek.rs line 1878) calls `read_events(&path)` on `default_events_path()`, then bails with "no st

title: Fix `deepseek cache-report` "no state log" when SQLite projection has data
